title: cardamine glacialis subsp. litoralis
intro: Cardamine glacialis subsp. litoralis, also known as sea bittercress or sea wintercress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its ability to thrive in coastal areas and moist environments. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cardamine glacialis subsp. litoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
